articles.title: Kiara Advani turns showstopper for Rahul Mishra in black couture, walks ramp with Karan Johar
articles.description: Kiara Advani turned heads as she walked the ramp for designer Rahul Mishra alongside Karan Johar at a Mercedes launch event. The actress impressed fans with her striking black couture look while gradually returning to public appearances after embracing motherhood.

articles.title: 'Gu' OTT release date: When and where to stream
articles.description: Malayalam horror-fantasy 'Gu,' starring Saiju Kurup and Deva Nandha, is set for a digital premiere on ManoramaMAX from June 19, 2026. The film, which blends mystery, folklore, and family drama in a Kerala setting, follows an eight-year-old girl uncovering an ancient family curse. After a theatrical run and re-release, the movie is now accessible online.

articles.title: Angelina stuns in strapless gown at 'Couture' screening- WATCH
articles.description: Angelina Jolie captivated New York City in a striking black and white ensemble while promoting her deeply personal film 'Couture'. The actress, who plays a director diagnosed with breast cancer, spoke about the film's themes of resilience and living life fully. Jolie shared her own vulnerability in taking on the role, reflecting on personal loss and the importance of strength.

articles.title: Peddi Box Office Day 13: Ram Charan Starrer Slows In Second Week, Earns Rs 317 Crore
articles.description: Peddi earned Rs 3.45 crore on Day 13, taking its worldwide gross to Rs 317.12 crore. Collections of the Ram Charan film dipped in week two amid mixed responses.

articles.description: Imtiaz Ali also reflected on how the younger generation is also very invested in Main Vaapas Aaunga.

articles.title: Patrick Mahomes' Wife Brittany Mahomes Brutally Trolled As Viral Clip Resurfaces
articles.description: Patrick Mahomes' wife Brittany Mahomes is once again at the center of online debate after her viral 2022 "resting face" courtside moment resurfaced.

articles.title: Did You Know How Much CM Vijay's Belt Costs? The Features Will Surprise You
articles.description: Why do celebrities like CM Vijay pick this belt over everything else? The reversible design, brass LV buckle, and hand-crafted leather tell the full story.

articles.title: On cam: Rihanna shows ₹2.2 crore gift from Ambanis received during Mumbai trip
articles.description: A new viral video has revealed one of Rihanna’s most talked-about gifts from India. The global music icon showed off a dazzling diamond bracelet gifted by the Ambani family during her visit to Mumbai, with jewellery experts estimating its value at around ₹2.2 crore.

articles.title: Where is Taylor Parker now? Latest update on death row inmate featured in Netflix's ‘Maternal Instinct’
articles.description: Interest in Taylor Parker's case has increased with Netflix's ‘Maternal Instinct’.

articles.title: 5 Reasons Why Widow's Bay Is The Best New Show Of 2026
articles.description: The new Apple TV series about a cursed island is the buzziest show on television. Here are five reasons why you need to check it out and add it to your watchlist immediately.

articles.title: Dia Mirza clarifies 'patriarchy caused the climate crisis' remark
articles.description: Actor and environmental advocate Dia Mirza has responded to criticism surrounding her recent remarks linking patriarchy to climate change, asserting that her comments were misunderstood and reiterating that she stands by her views. The actor took to Instagram to share a detailed note explaining that she was referring to patriarchal systems and power structures rather than blaming individual men for the climate crisis.

articles.title: 'We Are the Most Famous on Instagram': Modi-Meloni Reunion at G7 Revives Viral 'Melodi' Trend
articles.description: During the G7 Summit, Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni had their first face-to-face interaction following their viral “Melodi” moment.

articles.title: On the Border shuts all company-owned locations after bankruptcy
articles.description: On the Border Mexican Grill & Cantina has closed all remaining company-owned locations nationwide, ending more than four decades of Tex-Mex dining at a chain that helped popularize the cuisine across the country.

articles.title: "Patrick told me no resting b**ch face" — the Brittany Mahomes moment the internet never forgot
articles.description: In 2022, a viral video captured Brittany Mahomes being told by Patrick Mahomes to "no resting b*tch face" at a college basketball game. Her exaggerated smile response delighted and divided the internet, highlighting her already intense public scrutiny. Four years later, she embraces her loud public presence, proving that moment was just the beginning.

articles.title: MrBeast’s $1M challenge winner Philip DeFranco plans massive giveaway for subscribers
articles.description: YouTuber Philip DeFranco is gifting his entire $1 million MrBeast challenge prize to his subscribers. Forty lucky fans will each receive $25,000. DeFranco, who unexpectedly won the competition, revealed this generous plan in a TikTok video. He also alluded to potential attempts to influence voting during the challenge, though he remained unaware at the time.

articles.title: 7 K-Dramas On Loneliness That Remind Self-Worth Fixes Everything
articles.description: If you love stories with emotional depth, these 7 K-dramas powerfully explore loneliness, mental health, self-worth, grief, and healing. Here, every series ​offers deeply human and comforting storytelling, reminding us that this too shall pass if you have the willpower to overcome every challenge.

articles.title: Karishma Tanna reunites with Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi co-star Smriti Irani, calls it a 'full circle moment'
articles.description: Karishma Tanna reunited with her former Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi co-star Smriti Irani and called it a "full circle moment." The mom-to-be shared heartwarming pictures from their meeting, delighting fans of the iconic television show.

articles.title: When Ram Gopal Varma addressed affair rumours with Urmila Matondkar
articles.description: Urmila Matondkar's past relationship with Ram Gopal Varma resurfaces as her ex-husband Mohsin Akhtar remarries. Varma, who openly admired Matondkar, once addressed persistent affair rumors with a philosophical stance, stating he wouldn't discuss past events. Their professional collaborations fueled intense speculation for years.

articles.title: Sridevi Revolted Against Bollywood's ‘Feudal System’, Claims English Vinglish Co-Star Adil Hussain
articles.description: Adil Hussain mentioned that Sridevi belonged to the rare breed of accomplished actors who never fed the feudal system in the film industry.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by all-time best-known American film critic Roger Ebert: 'Life always has an unhappy ending, but...'- A powerful life lesson on why happiness matters more than finding perfect meaning by the first person to receive a Pulitzer Prize for film criticism
articles.description: Roger Ebert, the renowned film critic, offered a powerful life lesson. He suggested that life's journey, filled with joy and simple pleasures, holds more value than an unending quest for profound meaning. Ebert's perspective encourages appreciating present moments. His own life, marked by challenges, exemplified finding happiness amidst struggles. This wisdom resonates for everyone living their own story.

articles.title: VA rolling out study of MDMA therapy for veterans with PTSD
articles.description: The Department of Veterans Affairs is launching a new study on the use of MDMA, a synthetic psychoactive drug commonly known as ecstasy or molly, to treat veterans with severe mental health disorders like post-traumatic stress disorder or alcoholism.

articles.title: Vedang Raina Calls Main Vaapas Aaunga A ‘Special And Relevant’ Film, Expresses Gratitude: ‘I Feel Alive’
articles.description: Vedang Raina penned a note of gratitude, and said that Imtiaz Ali’s film ‘Main Vaapas Aaunga’ changed everything for him.

articles.title: Bengaluru techie's first salary was Rs 32,000. Then his father asked for Rs 5,000 and taught him a lesson he'll never forget
articles.description: A Bengaluru techie's first salary of Rs 32,000 was intended for personal purchases like shoes and a phone. However, his father's request for Rs 5,000 to contribute to others shifted his perspective. This experience taught him the profound fulfillment of giving back, making his first paycheck a lesson in responsibility and generosity rather than just spending.

articles.title: Top Women-Led Crime Thrillers On OTT: What To Watch On Netflix, Prime Video, JioHotstar And More

articles.title: Exclusive - Sayantani Ghosh on playing Maya In Jagadhatri: It’s More Disappointing When I Don’t Get Challenging Roles
articles.description: Sayantani Ghosh, celebrated for her role as Maya in Jagadhatri, thrives on challenging characters even after two decades in acting. She reveals upcoming episodes will expose hidden family truths and alter relationships, particularly involving Rekha, Sampada, and Sharad. Ghosh also hints at an emotional arc for Maya, exploring lingering feelings with her estranged husband, leaving room for future possibilities.
